message:
Add time module (WIP - needs allocator fix)

Created packages/runtime/src/time.zig with:
- time() - Get current time in seconds
- sleep() - Sleep for specified seconds
- monotonic() - Monotonic clock
- perf_counter() - Performance counter

Registered in import_resolver and import_registry.

Issue: Codegen adds allocator parameter incorrectly.
Need to detect when module functions don't need allocator.
